observedMutationClass: skill description narrowing, global rule fallback wording, trigger matrix boundary split, registry boundary clarification, active plan lifecycle compression, and recurrence closeout shard resync
acceptanceEvidenceClass: description word-budget check, trigger matrix and registry comparison, active plan budget recount, closeout changedPaths resync, and full rules lint; no gameplay or Unity runtime acceptance evidence
rootCause: Several routing descriptions and fixtures used broad shared trigger tokens instead of the intended owner/lifecycle/fallback boundary, so jg-unity-workflow could overlap too broadly with generic rule-unity and rule-context could compete with jg-game-design on product/UX judgment. The closeout shard also retained changedPaths from earlier cleanup that were no longer part of the current rules-only patch, and a completed UI source/candidate handoff remained active even though its residual work now belongs to progress or a future UI/runtime owner.
prevention: Keep repo-local skill descriptions scoped to owner/lifecycle/routing signals, keep rule-unity as a generic fallback/reference, keep rule-context as project background instead of product/UX judgment, mirror the boundaries in ops.skill-routing-registry and ops.skill-trigger-matrix, split mixed trigger fixture rows instead of accepting overlapping routes, compress completed or residual-only plans to reference when the active plan budget is at risk, and resync closeout changedPaths to the current patch scope. This change does not alter existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, or progress evidence overload.
verification: Description word-budget check for edited skills; trigger matrix split review against ops.skill-routing-registry; active plan recount confirmed four non-progress active plans; npm run --silent rules:sync-closeout -- --artifact artifacts/rules/issue-recurrence-closeout.d/local-f4bd323541.json synced five rules-only changed paths; npm run --silent rules:lint; manual verification of external global skill paths C:/Users/SOL/.codex/skills/rule-unity/SKILL.md and C:/Users/SOL/.codex/skills/rule-context/SKILL.md; repo lint cannot track external global skill file diffs
